response.justification: Maria has extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and performance optimization, with a strong foundation in C, C++, Java, and JavaScript. However, her resume lacks direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical methods required for growth/experimentation systems. Her recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure and pricing automation, which are tangential but not directly aligned with the core responsibilities of this role.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and high-performance computing (e.g., low-latency apps, microservices handling millions of requests)
Proven technical leadership and mentorship (e.g., organizing workshops, setting up CI/CD pipelines, contributing to open-source projects)
Versatility across multiple programming languages and paradigms (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, D, TypeScript, Python)
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation frameworks, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platforms
Limited evidence of working with AI tools to accelerate engineering velocity or building systemic solutions for multiple teams
Recent roles are not aligned with the core focus areas of growth/experimentation systems (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, pricing automation)

key_factors.factor: proficiency in required technologies (e.g., experimentation frameworks, telemetry)
